params.minLpShares: Minimum LP shares to receive (slippage guard)

params.minAmountOut: Minimum outcome tokens to receive (slippage guard)

params.initialLiquidity: USDC amount for initial AMM seeding
params.question: Human-readable question

params.amount: USDC to lock (and amount of each token minted)

addLiquidity(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Adds liquidity to a market's AMM

buy(uint256,uint8,uint256,uint256).notice: Buys outcome tokens using USDC via the AMM

createMarket(string,address,uint256,uint.notice: Creates a new binary prediction market

getMarket(uint256).notice: Returns the full state of a market

getPrice(uint256,uint8).notice: Returns the AMM spot price of an outcome token

mintOutcomeTokens(uint256,uint256).notice: Mints an equal amount of YES and NO tokens against USDC collateral

redeemWinningTokens(uint256).notice: Redeems winning outcome tokens for proportional USDC payout

removeLiquidity(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Removes liquidity from a market's AMM

resolveMarket(uint256).notice: Resolves a market using its Chainlink oracle feed

sell(uint256,uint8,uint256,uint256).notice: Sells outcome tokens for USDC via the AMM
